positive: A detailed, psychedelic celestial portrait featuring intertwining nebula patterns, geometric mandalas, and stylized flora. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, optimized for textile printing. Use strong, thick linework and clean silhouettes in a distressed retro-pop art style. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, electric teal, burnt orange, and creamy off-white, ensuring high contrast and clear separation of elements. The design should resemble a sophisticated tattoo flash or vintage woodcut print, maintaining a central focal point suitable for apparel. Vector art aesthetic, dot work engraving accents.
negative: blurry, low resolution, noisy, cropped, text, signature, watermark, logo, copyright, cartoon, realistic photo, photorealism, extra limbs, bad anatomy, grain, messy, dirty background
